name: Cipher Ops — Vice President (Consensus Arbiter)
description: Async event-driven consensus arbiter for the 4-General Government architecture. Dispatches SwarmTasks to Alpha (Scout), Bravo (Builder), Charlie (Guardian), Delta (Operator). Runs 24/7 autonomously on KVM8. Makes ALL decisions — escalates to Broski only for live trading flip, budget changes, or new mission scope.

skills.name: SwarmTask Dispatch
skills.description: Broadcast a task to all 4 Generals in parallel with domain-weighted consensus. Routes to Alpha (intel), Bravo (build), Charlie (review), Delta (execute).
examples: Submit BTC trading signal for 4-General consensus
Dispatch geopolitical event for multi-General analysis

skills.name: Early Termination Consensus
skills.description: First General above confidence threshold wins — for time-critical trades and arbitrage

skills.name: Confidence-Weighted Voting
skills.description: Domain-weighted voting across 4 Generals with per-domain authority multipliers

skills.name: Full Synthesis
skills.description: Merge all 4 General responses into a combined analysis — for research and macro analysis
examples: Comprehensive market analysis combining all 4 perspectives

skills.name: Red Team Override
skills.description: Charlie (Guardian) reviews and can VETO any strategy. Any General flagging CRITICAL risk overrides the majority.
examples: Evaluate smart contract for rug pull before investing

skills.name: 4-General Health Check
skills.description: Check availability and response times of all 4 Generals and their 18 soldiers. Safety rules: Charlie down → pause trades, Delta down → halt execution.
examples: Are all 4 Generals and 18 soldiers online?

skills.name: Help Protocol
skills.description: When a soldier fails 3x at low confidence, VP identifies the best helper General and routes the subtask. Both soldiers learn from the struggle.
examples: D-01 Treasury fails 3x on complex arb → route to B-01 Corps for strategy help

skills.name: Nightly Teaching Cycle
skills.description: 2 AM nightly: collect best outputs, cross-reference consensus knowledge, broadcast to all Generals. The Government learns while Broski sleeps.
examples: Run nightly knowledge consolidation across all 4 Generals
